title: Testkit Provider Compliance
subtitle: Provider × compliance test — every implementer of a provider interface runs the same suite
purpose: The contract claim: any provider in any package must pass arcana-testkit's runComplianceSuite. v0.2.0 ships with two providers (libsql for StructuredStore + sqlite-vec for VectorStore). 232 tests across 24 files.

providers.v0_1_target: Full StructuredStore over libsql — all 9 entity types, in-memory integration tests. DVR-EC-001 fix: mkdirSync parent dir on file-path connections.
providers.v0_2_target: FTS5 fulltext index — memories_fts virtual table + sync triggers; searchFulltext implements the new contract method. asOf valid-time filter on getFactsForEntity.

tests.label: storeMemory then getMemory returns the same Memory
All 9 entity types covered with in-memory SQLite integration tests
searchFulltext ranks matches by relevance (FTS5 bm25)
searchFulltext returns empty for whitespace-only query
FTS index stays in sync with INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE triggers
getFactsForEntity asOf filter excludes expired facts

providers.v0_1_target: Shipped in v0.1.1 as new package — vec0 virtual table + rowid_ref pattern.
providers.note: Unblocks KyberAgent Desktop and ChromaDB removal from KyberBot.

tests.label: upsert one chunk, query returns it

providers.v0_3_target: Brain migration gate — full StructuredStore over Postgres including tsvector @@ to_tsquery impl of searchFulltext satisfying the same contract as the libsql FTS5 impl. Not started.
providers.note: Required for Brain to swap off Convex. Schema must shed the 5 Convex artifacts (ADR 008).

tests.label: searchFulltext via tsvector @@ to_tsquery (contract-equivalent to FTS5 impl)

providers.v0_1_target: Not in v0.1 — placeholder row to show the suite scales. Kybernesis Brain must shed 5 Convex artifacts before this is viable.

tests.label: storeMemory then getMemory returns the same Memory
